title: Magnitude and Direction of a Displacement Vector
body: A mouse pointer moves from point $$(6.0$$ cm, $$1.6$$ cm) to point $$(2.0$$ cm, $$4.5$$ cm) on a monitor. From Example $$2.3$$, the displacement vector is $$D=-4i+2.9j$$ cm. What are the magnitude and direction angle of this displacement vector?
